mission.title: dragonfly: Support Stream data structure
mission.description: Support Stream data structure. Requested by 5+ users.

steps.title: Check current dragonfly deployment
steps.description:
Verify your dragonfly version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n dragonfly -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dragonfly
helm list -n dragonfly 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working dragonfly installation.

steps.title: Review dragonfly configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant dragonfly configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n dragonfly -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dragonfly
kubectl get configmap -n dragonfly -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=dragonfly
```
Hello, came across Dragonfly on Hacker News. Very cool project – good luck with it!

I am very interested in [Stream data structure](https://redis.io/docs/manual/data-types/streams/) support - think that's the only missing command for me to start

steps.title: Apply the fix for Support Stream data structure
steps.description:
1. Correctly parse keys for EVAL command.
2. Support PUBLISH within lua.
3. Remove spurious failure in debug-mode with the increased verbosity level.
```yaml
redis-cli
SCRIPT LOAD "return ARGV[1]"
EVALSHA 098e0f0d1448c0a81dafe820f66d460eb09263da 2 s d arg1
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n dragonfly -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dragonfly
kubectl get events -n dragonfly --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Support Stream data structure" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
1. Correctly parse keys for EVAL command.
2. Support PUBLISH within lua.
3. Remove spurious failure in debug-mode with the increased verbosity level.
codeSnippets:
redis-cli
SCRIPT LOAD "return ARGV[1]"
EVALSHA 098e0f0d1448c0a81dafe820f66d460eb09263da 2 s d arg1

git clone https://github.com/centrifugal/centrifuge.git
cd centrifuge
go test -run xxx -benchmem -tags integration -bench BenchmarkRedisPublish_1Ch -benchtime 1s

127.0.0.1:6379> SCRIPT LOAD "
local epoch
if redis.call('exists', KEYS[2]) ~= 0 then
  epoch = redis.call("hget", KEYS[2], "e")
end
if epoch == false or epoch == nil then
  epoch = ARGV[6]
  redis.call("hset", KEYS[2], "e", epoch)
end
local offset = redis.call("hincrby", KEYS[2], "s", 1)
if ARGV[5] ~= '0' then
	redis.call("expire", KEYS[2], ARGV[5])
end
redis.call("xadd", KEYS[1], "MAXLEN", ARGV[2], offset, "d", ARGV[1])
redis.call("expire", KEYS[1], ARGV[3])
if ARGV[4] ~= '' then
	local payload = "__" .. "p1:" .. offset .. ":" .. epoch .. "__" .. ARGV[1]
	redis.call("publish", ARGV[4], payload)
end
return {offset, epoch}
	"
"5707131deda7789195310ee90da9fab71faf2e68"

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with dragonfly installed or the issue environment reproducible.
